data.body: Blocking-review remediation: corrected the nonexistent src/rebar/__main__.py:70,102 reference to src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/__main__.py:70,102 in both Scope and file-impact metadata. Current-base Mypy 2.3.0 measurement at 0f5dbc88b reports 24 unused-ignore diagnostics across 20 files, including the newly present src/rebar/mcp_server.py:644, so the plan and mapping criterion now use 24 rather than 23. Both ACs requiring ticket comments are tagged exactly [operator-attested] per ADR 0043 and require concrete version/SHA/command/outcome or per-diagnostic disposition evidence. Residual-path assertion confirms the wrong path is absent; check-ac, quality-check, and clarity-check 5/5 pass. The changed plan/base requires a fresh signed review.
